BadRequest.description:
- **INPUT_MODEL_NOT_FOUND**: Model 'model_name' not found. Available models: ....
- **INPUT_INVALID_LABELS**: Invalid training labels. At least {min_labels} unique labels are required for training.
- **INPUT_LABEL_LIMIT_EXCEEDED**: Label limit exceeded: {current} labels provided, maximum N allowed for your plan. Reduce the number of labels or upgrade your plan at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager.

Conflict.description: - **CONFLICT_RESOURCE_BUSY**: {resource_type} '{resource_id}' is currently being modified. Please retry after a few moments.

Forbidden.description:
- **AUTHZ_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE**: Insufficient account balance. Top up your account at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager.
- **AUTHZ_RESOURCE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED**: Resource limit exceeded for your plan. Current: {current}, limit: N. Delete existing resources or upgrade your plan at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager.

GatewayTimeout.description: - **SERVICE_TIMEOUT**: Request timed out after {timeout_seconds} seconds. Try with smaller inputs or retry later.

InternalServerError.description: - **INTERNAL_ERROR**: An unexpected error occurred. If this persists, contact support with the request_id from this response.

NotFound.description: - **RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND**: {resource_type} '{resource_id}' not found or access denied. Verify the ID and your permissions.

ServiceUnavailable.description: - **SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE**: Service temporarily unavailable. Please retry with exponential backoff.

TooManyRequests.description:
- **RATE_REQUEST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED**: Request rate limit exceeded: {current}/N requests per minute. Reduce request frequency or upgrade your plan at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager.
- **RATE_TOKEN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED**: Token rate limit exceeded: {current:,}/{limit:,} tokens per minute. Reduce batch sizes or upgrade your plan at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager.
- **RATE_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED**: Concurrency limit exceeded: {current}/N concurrent requests. Wait for pending requests to complete before sending new ones.
- **RATE_IP_LIMIT_EXCEEDED**: IP rate limit exceeded. Too many requests from this IP address. Reduce request frequency.

Unauthorized.description:
- **AUTH_MISSING_API_KEY**: Authentication required. Provide your API key via the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer <api-key>'. Get your API key at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager.
- **AUTH_INVALID_API_KEY**: Invalid API key. Verify your API key at https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager or generate a new one.
- **AUTH_INVALID_FORMAT**: Invalid authorization format. Use 'Authorization: Bearer <api-key>' with a valid Jina API key (65 characters, starts with 'jina_').

BatchEmbeddingRequest.description: Request to create a batch embedding job.

dimensions.description: Number of dimensions for output embeddings (1-1024).
dimensions.title: Dimensions

input.description: Inline JSONL lines for small batches. Either input_url or input must be provided.
input.title: Input

input_url.description: URL to input JSONL file (GCS, S3, or HTTP). Either input_url or input must be provided.
input_url.title: Input Url

model.description: The embedding model to use for batch processing.
model.title: Model

normalized.description: If true (default), embeddings are L2-normalized to unit length.
normalized.title: Normalized

task.description: Task optimization: retrieval, text-matching, clustering, or classification.
task.title: Task

webhook_url.description: URL to POST notification when job completes.
webhook_url.title: Webhook Url

BatchEmbeddingRequest.title: BatchEmbeddingRequest

total_tokens.description: Total tokens consumed across all processed lines.
total_tokens.title: Total Tokens

BatchStatus.description: Status of a batch embedding job.

batch_id.description: Unique identifier for the batch job.
batch_id.title: Batch Id

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when job completed (if finished).
completed_at.title: Completed At

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when job was created.
created_at.title: Created At

error_file_url.description: URL to download error JSONL for failed lines.
error_file_url.title: Error File Url

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when output URL expires (created_at + 24h).
expires_at.title: Expires At

output_url.description: Signed URL to download output JSONL (24h expiry).
output_url.title: Output Url

status.description: Current status of the batch job.
status.title: Status

BatchStatus.title: BatchStatus

predictions.description: All candidate labels with scores, or a dict per group.

score.description: Confidence score, or a dict of scores per group.

is_latest.title: Is Latest

user_id.description: User ID who owns the classifier

documents.text: Attention Is All You Need: This groundbreaking paper introduced the Transformer architecture, revolutionizing natural language processing and becoming the foundation for modern large language models like GPT and BERT.

documents: Recent advances in computer vision have led to the development of vision transformers (ViTs) that achieve state-of-the-art performance on image classification tasks by treating images as sequences of patches.

documents.text: Graph Neural Networks: A Review of Methods and Applications. This comprehensive survey covers the latest developments in graph-based machine learning, including graph convolutional networks and graph attention mechanisms.

documents: Traditional database systems struggle with the volume and variety of modern data workloads, leading to the adoption of distributed computing frameworks like Apache Spark and Hadoop for big data processing.
example.query: innovative artificial intelligence research papers and visual data analysis

query.title: Query

return_documents.description: If true (default), includes document content in each result.
return_documents.title: Return Documents

top_n.description: Number of top results to return. If not set, returns all documents.
top_n.title: Top N

truncation.description: If true, truncates documents exceeding the model's max token limit.
truncation.title: Truncation

documents: Climate Change and Renewable Energy: A Global Perspective. Rising temperatures and extreme weather events are accelerating the transition to solar and wind power worldwide.
Le changement climatique et l'énergie renouvelable : une perspective européenne. L'Union européenne investit massivement dans les technologies vertes pour atteindre la neutralité carbone d'ici 2050.
Klimawandel und erneuerbare Energien: Deutsche Energiewende. Deutschland führt die Transformation des Energiesektors durch innovative Technologien und politische Maßnahmen an.
气候变化对可再生能源的影响：中国的绿色发展战略。中国正在大力推进太阳能和风能项目，以实现碳中和目标。
Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare: Revolutionizing Medical Diagnosis. AI-powered systems are improving accuracy in disease detection and treatment recommendations.
Blockchain Technology: Transforming Financial Services. Decentralized finance applications are reshaping traditional banking and payment systems.

info.description:
Best-in-class embeddings, rerankers, and classifiers. Search AI for multilingual and multimodal data.

## Capabilities

- **Text Embeddings**: Dense vector representations for semantic search, similarity, and classification
- **Multimodal Embeddings**: Process images, PDFs, and text in a unified vector space
- **Reranking**: Refine search results with precise relevance scoring
- **Classification**: Zero-shot and few-shot text classification
- **Multi-vector Embeddings**: Token-level embeddings for ColBERT and late interaction
- **Batch Embeddings**: Asynchronous bulk embedding processing via JSONL input/output

## Authentication

Include your API key in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer jina_YOUR_API_KEY
```

Get your API key at [jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager](https://jina.ai/api-dashboard/key-manager). New users receive **10M free tokens**.

## Rate Limits

| Tier | RPM | TPM | Concurrency |
|------|-----|-----|-------------|
| Free | 500 | 1M | 5 |
| Tier 1 | 500 | 10M | 50 |
| Tier 2 | 5,000 | 100M | 500 |

Rate limit headers are included in responses: `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Requests`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining-Tokens`.

## Error Codes

All endpoints may return the following errors. Endpoint-specific errors are documented per operation.

| Code | Status | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `INPUT_MODEL_NOT_FOUND` | 400 | Model 'X' not found |
| `INPUT_INVALID_LABELS` | 400 | Invalid training labels |
| `INPUT_LABEL_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 400 | Label limit exceeded: {current} labels provided, maximum N allowed for your plan |
| `AUTH_MISSING_API_KEY` | 401 | Authentication required |
| `AUTH_INVALID_API_KEY` | 401 | Invalid API key |
| `AUTH_INVALID_FORMAT` | 401 | Invalid authorization format |
| `AUTHZ_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE` | 403 | Insufficient account balance |
| `AUTHZ_RESOURCE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 403 | Resource limit exceeded for your plan |
| `RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | {resource_type} '{resource_id}' not found or access denied |
| `CONFLICT_RESOURCE_BUSY` | 409 | {resource_type} '{resource_id}' is currently being modified |
| `RATE_REQUEST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 429 | Request rate limit exceeded: {current}/N requests per minute |
| `RATE_TOKEN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 429 | Token rate limit exceeded: {current:,}/{limit:,} tokens per minute |
| `RATE_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 429 | Concurrency limit exceeded: {current}/N concurrent requests |
| `RATE_IP_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 429 | IP rate limit exceeded |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | An unexpected error occurred |
| `SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` | 503 | Service temporarily unavailable |
| `SERVICE_TIMEOUT` | 504 | Request timed out after {timeout_seconds} seconds |
info.title: Jina Search Foundation API

get.description:
Basic health check endpoint.

Returns 200 if the service is running. This is the simplest health check
that only verifies the process is alive and can handle HTTP requests.

Liveness probe for Kubernetes/Cloud Run.

Lightweight check that the process is responsive. Unlike readiness,
this should not check external dependencies - it only verifies that
the event loop is not blocked and can handle requests.

A failed liveness probe typically results in container restart.

Readiness probe for Kubernetes/Cloud Run.

Checks if the service is ready to accept traffic by verifying:
- Redis connectivity (if redis_client is provided)

Returns:
    200 with status details if ready
    503 with failure details if not ready

post.description:
Classify text or images into categories.

Zero-shot and few-shot classification. Zero-shot uses embedding similarity,
few-shot uses a trained classifier.

Generate embeddings for text, images, or documents.

World-class multimodal multilingual embeddings for semantic search,
similarity matching, clustering, and classification tasks.

Returns model metadata in OpenRouter-compatible format including
model IDs, input/output modalities, context lengths, and pricing.

Accepts both full form (`jina-ai/jina-embeddings-v3`) and
short form (`jina-embeddings-v3`).

World-class reranker for maximizing search relevancy and RAG accuracy.

with additional training data.

tags.description:
List available Jina AI models and their capabilities.

Returns model metadata in OpenRouter-compatible format including model IDs, input/output modalities, context lengths, and pricing information. Use this endpoint to discover available models before making API calls.
tags.name: Model List

tags.description:
Generate embeddings and rerank documents using state-of-the-art models.

**Embeddings** convert text, images, and documents into dense vector representations for semantic search, RAG, and similarity matching. Available models include `jina-embeddings-v3` (multilingual, 8K context), `jina-embeddings-v4` (multimodal, 32K context), `jina-embeddings-v5-text-small` (multilingual, 32K context, 1024-dim), `jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano` (multilingual, 8K context, 768-dim), and `jina-clip-v2` (text-image, 89 languages).

**Reranking** refines search results by scoring query-document relevance. Models include `jina-reranker-v3` (0.6B, 131K context, listwise reranking), `jina-reranker-m0` (multimodal, 29 languages), `jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual` (100+ languages, function calling support), and `jina-colbert-v2` (late interaction for high precision).
tags.name: Search Foundation Models

tags.description:
Categorize text and images using embedding-based classification.

**Zero-shot**: Classify inputs into semantic labels without training data. Supports up to 256 classes. Best for flexible, immediate classification with descriptive labels.

**Few-shot**: Train custom classifiers with labeled examples (200-400 samples recommended). Supports incremental updates and handles domain-specific or time-sensitive data. Limited to 16 classes and 16 classifiers per API key.

Supports multilingual text via `jina-embeddings-v3`, `jina-embeddings-v5-text-small`, `jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano`, and multimodal (text/image) via `jina-clip-v2` or `jina-embeddings-v4`.
tags.name: Zero/Few-shot Classification

tags.description:
Asynchronous batch embedding processing for large-scale workloads.

Submit embedding jobs with up to 50,000 inputs via GCS file URL or up to 10,000 inputs inline. Jobs are processed asynchronously - poll for status, then download output as JSONL when complete.

**Workflow**: 1) Submit job via `POST /v1/batch/embeddings` with input data and model selection. 2) Poll `GET /v1/batch/{batch_id}` until status is `completed`. 3) Download results from `GET /v1/batch/{batch_id}/output`.

**Input format**: OpenAI-compatible JSONL with `custom_id` and `body.input` fields. Supports both inline JSON arrays and GCS-hosted JSONL files for larger batches.

**Supported models**: `jina-embeddings-v5-text-small` (1024-dim, 32K context) and `jina-embeddings-v5-text-nano` (768-dim, 8K context). All task types supported: retrieval, text-matching, clustering, classification.

Output files expire after 24 hours. Optional webhook notifications on job completion.
tags.name: Batch Embeddings
